case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. MAR BIDES

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-24-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIDES, MAR AKA MAROLINO GARCIA BIDES $8,547.86 PRINCIPAL, $925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,697.86, SEE SCANNED DOC
